title: Invisible Item frames
description: Adds craftable invisible item frames for survival — works with both normal and glow item frames!
body:
📝 Description

# **Invisible Item Frames **
Lets you craft invisible item frames directly in survival mode — no commands, no cheats!
Combine a glass pane with either a normal or glow item frame to create an Invisible Item Frame.
When placed, it looks just like a normal one — but as soon as you put an item inside, the frame becomes completely invisible, leaving only your displayed item floating in the air.
Perfect for decoration, map displays, custom furniture!

**📜 How to Use**

**1** Craft an Invisible Item Frame (Item Frame + Glass Pane) or take it from the creative inventory.

**2** Place it anywhere

**3** Add any item to make the frame vanish!

**4** Remove the item to make the frame visible again!


**Ingame looking👀**
![InGame Looking👀](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6eb6d28c5d0ef3db6aea949856d45df06da619c3_0.webp)


**Notes❗**

Currently only supports version 1.21 and the English and German languages.
I'm working on improvements.

A Discord server is coming soon, where you can report bugs and share suggestions!
